ChangeRequest.name: Exchange tradable derivative position role type domain
ChangeRequest.comment:
### Overview
There is an issue with Exchange tradable derivative position role type domain. There are two members with code 4:
* Non-balance sheet recognised exchange tradable derivative asset position * Exchange tradable derivative position as a hedge
causing the member _'Exchange tradable derivative position as a hedge'_ to disappear in the (E)IL.
### Contact person
@Arianna.Nuvoli
### Description of change request
Change the code of the member 'Exchange tradable derivative position as a hedge' (also in the SDD).
### Forward Engineering considerations
Double check that the member 'Exchange tradable derivative position as a hedge' is included in the new (E)Il version
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
